subject: Hey...you still here?
text:
Hey there,

We noticed you haven?t opened an edition in a while. We miss sharing the biggest headlines and tools in tech with you every week. Plus, we?ve got some exciting upgrades headed your way shortly. So if you want back in?

**All you have to do is this: **Click below to confirm you'd like to keep receiving newsletters from Future Tools.

Keep me subscribed (https://futuretools.beehiiv.com/)

_Note: If we don't hear from you soon, we'll go ahead and remove you from the list._

Hope to see you in your inbox soon,

_? Matt, Catherine, and the FT team_
